name: R-2 ten react rules: every g-react-* rule declares the recommended: boolean field per §16 E-8
command: n_rules=$(grep -rE 'id: g-react-' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); n_files=$(grep -rl 'g-react-' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); n_recommended=$(grep -rE 'recommended:' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/{react,w3c,google,web-vitals}/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$n_recommended" -ge "$n_rules" ] && echo recommended_present 1>&2
